name: slc-pow-miner
description: Safe-first Silicoin/SLC proof-of-work miner with CPU fallback and optional CUDA backend

scripts.mine:max: RUN_TX=true GPU=true CUDA_BATCH=268435456 LOG_EVERY_SEC=5 node src/mine.js
scripts.mine:turbo: RUN_TX=true GPU=true CUDA_BATCH=536870912 LOG_EVERY_SEC=5 node src/mine.js
scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/slc.js && node --check src/status.js && node --check src/mine.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/bench.js && node --check src/cuda.js && node --check src/report.js
